rationale.R1.1: Identifies a key conceptual issue and proposes a well-supported reframing.
rationale.R1.2: Walks through the argument chain, flags inconsistencies, and proposes fixes.
rationale.R1.4: Names prior works but doesn't map them in detail or provide sharp contrast.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainties and provides specific feedback on each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in original draft.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites traced, minor edits not.
